summary: Comprehensive testing of FinPulse app with new Remont (Renovation) tab completed successfully. All major features working correctly including Fear Bar, CRUD operations, filtering, and budget management.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height dimensions being -1

passed_tests: Remont tab navigation with Hammer icon and amber color
Fear Bar budget visualization with correct values (150k total, 8.15k spent, 26.9k frozen, 114.95k free)
Budget progress bar with colored segments (rose/amber/emerald)
4 stat tiles display correctly (Całkowity budżet, Wydane, Zamrożone, Wolne)
Items list shows 9 seeded renovation items with status badges
All 5 status filter tabs work (Wszystkie: 9, Inspiracje: 1, Planowane: 4, Zrealizowane: 3, Do weryfikacji: 1)
Add item modal opens with all form fields (name, amount, room, type, status, link, notes)
Create new item saves to Supabase and appears in list
Edit item modal opens pre-filled with existing data
Status change workflow (chevron button advances status)
Delete confirmation popup and item removal
Budget editing functionality (clickable total, input field, save/cancel)
Dynamic budget recalculation after CRUD operations
Existing Mieszkanie tab continues to work
Existing Wiadomości AI tab continues to work
